courses.title: Sales Katha
courses.subtitle: Story-led practical sales training
courses.description: A field-oriented course that uses real sales situations to strengthen prospecting, conversation quality, objection handling, and closing discipline.

courses.title: Sales Ki Niti
courses.subtitle: Sales strategy and process rhythm
courses.description: A program for owners, managers, and sales leaders who need repeatable sales systems, stronger review discipline, and better team execution.

courses.title: Sales Mein Molbhav
courses.subtitle: Negotiation skills for sales teams
courses.description: A negotiation-focused course that helps salespeople protect value, respond to price pressure, and close with confidence.

blogs.title: Sales Training Is Not a One-Day Event
blogs.excerpt: Training works best when it is connected to field behaviour, measurable outcomes, and manager-led follow-up.
blogs.content: Sales capability improves when learning is translated into visible field actions. A workshop can create momentum, but the real change happens when managers review conversations, coach against specific gaps, and measure improvement week after week.
blogs.author: Sanjay Singh

blogs.title: Why SME Sales Teams Need a Review Rhythm
blogs.excerpt: A simple review rhythm helps owners see pipeline quality, team gaps, and urgent conversion opportunities.
blogs.content: Many SME sales problems are not caused by lack of demand. They come from unclear ownership, inconsistent follow-up, and weak visibility into pipeline health. A disciplined review rhythm gives leaders the evidence needed to coach and act.
blogs.author: Strategic Concepts

downloads.title: Sales Audit Checklist
downloads.description: A practical checklist to inspect process gaps, review discipline, conversion leaks, and sales team readiness.

downloads.title: Corporate Training Overview
downloads.description: A short overview of the sales training themes, delivery modes, and measurable learning outcomes.
